title: v7.0 frontier: persistent Mission Control session and organization view
description: Project Agent Session Observability into Mission Control as a persistent current-state view: organization councils/teams/roles, latest agent session stream, runtime audit summary, archmap impact, and next action must be visible after execution, not only during transient runtime activity.
triage_notes: Opened from runtime situation-assess and operator feedback that transient execution visuals are insufficient; current organization/session state must remain visible.
